{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603210058255D67AD78E8F10BD436DD"}"},"total":647},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7511350859047306008","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很少给五星呢，写的很不错，人物刻画立体，情节细腻不拖沓，很好的抓住了读者的胃口，掐着他的咽喉，冷峻而又高傲的低语，‘读不读，好不好看！’，然后桀桀桀的狂笑","text_exts":[{"e":66,"s":63,"text":"不好看","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%8D%E5%A5%BD%E7%9C%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740259050BD436DD%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227511350859047306008%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227444848643984591897%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%8D%E5%A5%BD%E7%9C%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748875648,"group_id":"7444848643984591897","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+AwNvVedjdEoFT7fAb53Zn20hs+AB16LeAvc3Zqd4pN","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3978484327389895","user_name":"金沙漠的戴亚博里古"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3978484327389895","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7444848643984591897","book_info":{"abstract":"【实教】+【春物】+【天使大人】+【路人女主】+【五等分】+【声之形？】.......大杂烩就完事了
【ps：一年级实教，二年级总武高，第一卷为实教同人，想看综漫可以直接跳至第二卷。】
有些存在从出生时便注定会成为太阳，不论路途多么坎坷，结果始终如一。
注定站在顶端的少年，到底会给人带来怎样的故事。
是救赎？是改变？还是...把她们拖入深渊。
你好，我叫轩辕宁，是个烂人，是个混蛋，也是一道光，能带给你不一样生活的一道光。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/221dd6413559bba7b6e3c46dbec9003b","author":"请好好吃饭好好生活","author_id":"","book_id":"7444848643984591897","book_name":"综漫：坏了，怎么都成我老婆了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0c8d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7444848678298190361","read_count":"26087","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1880475"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"870","tags":"动漫衍生,二次元,综漫,同人,轻小说,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b74db66e7dc298b402a08c692d586b11~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779209905&x-signature=9Pt9wtea%2Bf5NVxdsDAJaNspBqBw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"229168774652830","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"570"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603210058255D67AD78E8F10BD436DD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读24小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":18471,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":86913,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3871},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7557806024616411929","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可以当轻小说看，里面男女主感情线写的很好的，很自然的，虽然说作者是通过综漫里面那些女角色的身世还有性格，来对套下药的，但是不可否定的是他处理多种女角色与感情之间写的很自然而然，而且一个敌对的势力，既是朋友也是敌人。这种有一个较强大的对手，就不会显得一直是平淡的日常感，也有紧凑的对战情节，非常不错，对自己非常有自知之明吧，这种，写自己擅长的，不擅长方面会学习后来写，但是不会去详细，所以说就偏日常，但是不会有腻的那种感觉，因为它有打斗戏，而且还有一点小智斗，这种平淡而日常，丰富而不平庸非常不错"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759695230,"group_id":"7444848643984591897","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无所谓。。。。。。。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9K2y4Rj0K+JUqqJyn+ik6M=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"95932608181","user_name":"度此地"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"95932608181","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7444848643984591897","book_info":{"abstract":"【实教】+【春物】+【天使大人】+【路人女主】+【五等分】+【声之形？】.......大杂烩就完事了
